title: Roadmap one-pager

body:
Culturally Adapted Diabetes Intervention - Protocol

Participant Eligibility Criteria

Participants must have a documented T2DM diagnosis for at least 12 months and be receiving stable oral hypoglycemic therapy.

Dietary Intervention Framework

The intervention protocol emphasizes portion-controlled adaptations of traditional cultural staples with a target of 45% carbohydrate energy intake.

Cultural Menu Adaptations

See appendix for the 24 adapted dishes and per-region substitution guidance.

Session Cadence

12 weekly group sessions of 75 minutes each, followed by a 6-month follow-up phase with monthly individual check-ins.

Data Collection Requirements

Baseline, 3-month, 6-month, and 12-month clinical markers: HbA1c, fasting glucose, lipid panel, weight, waist circumference, and 3-day food diary.

Adverse Event Reporting

Report all adverse events within 24 hours to the PI Dr. Sarah Adler using the standard AE form.
title: Culturally Adapted Diabetes Intervention - Protocol
